channel.title: Career Transition on Mahwish Profile
channel.description: Recent content in Career Transition on Mahwish Profile

item.title: My Journey into Data Analytics
item.description:
Introduction

My journey into data analytics began while working in pension administration, where I was responsible for financial data reconciliation, reporting, and validating pension payment records. Although accuracy and compliance were key aspects of the role, I found myself particularly interested in analyzing data, identifying discrepancies, and uncovering patterns.

Discovering Analytics

A significant part of my work involved comparing datasets from banks against internal records, performing variance analysis in Excel, and preparing reports for management. These responsibilities strengthened my analytical thinking and attention to detail while showing me the value of data-driven decision-making.
